name: LinkTracker
postCreateCommand: cd deploy && cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null; cp -n valkey.example.conf valkey.conf 2>/dev/null; cp -n sentinel.example.conf sentinel.conf 2>/dev/null; cp -n users.example.acl users.acl 2>/dev/null; echo '--- Config files created. Edit deploy/.env to add your tokens ---'
